content:
• 📂 Canvas Presentation: Week 4 | Crafting a Good Thesis Statement
• 📖 Textbook Reading: Chapter 5 Section 1: Developing a Strong, Clear Thesis Statement

🎯 Focus:
• Strengthening thesis statements & argument structure.
• Ensuring clear comparison with effective transitions.
• Drafting body paragraphs with logical coherence & supporting evidence.

Day 16 | Grammar & Editing for Coherence | Thursday

📌 Main Tasks:
• 📊 Quiz: Week 4 | Quiz (Students complete & submit)
• Final review of grammar, sentence clarity, and structure.

📚 Readings & Presentations:
• ✅ Knowledge Check: Week 4 | Evaluating Thesis Statements
• ✅ Knowledge Check: Week 4 | Grammatically Correct Sentences

🎯 Focus:
• Strengthening sentence structure to avoid common errors.
